title: Standard Nine Skills & Agent Mapping
summary: The 9 baseline skills distributed to all Brotherhood projects (lint-and-validate, security-auditor, deployment-procedures, create-pr, systematic-debugging, test-driven-development, docker-expert, observability-engineer, bdistill-knowledge-extraction). Documents which ~1,390 of 1,401 community skills were explicitly rejected and why. Maps agents to skills and lists conflict rules.
